body:
## Purpose
To replace some functions with corresponding extensions from existing packages. (and the relevant tests/examples)
resolves #92 
## In this PR
- ParameterDistributions: By extending from `StatsBase`. Replacing `get_mean` `get_var` `get_cov` 'sample_distribution' by extending `mean` `var` `cov` `sample` 
- ParameterDistributions: by extending `Base`: Change `len` to `length`, added `size`, change `dimension`and `get_total_dimension` to `ndims`
title: Extending functions from packges

body:
Relaxes the allowed types of some objects and input args for improved generalization:

- Vector - > AbstractVector
- Matrix -> AbstractMatrix
- Sparse.SparseMatrix -> AbstractMatrix
- Union{Vector, Matrix} -> AbstractVecOrMat

For covariance matrices in output space,

- Matrix -> Union{AbstractMatrix, UniformScaling}

Tests involving different matrix types are now included for all Ensemble Kalman Processes.
title: Substitute types by abstractions.
